title: Create: Copper Restored
description: A resourpack that brings back the OG copper textures for Create 0.6 and above
body:
Just a simple resourpack for those who don't like the new copper textures made for Create 0.6 and above

Most textures just ported from old versions and new ones/ones who changed models remade by me (a little bit lazily)
![Copper textures with this resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/275fc35a86b943b3c4f6a5ee3216fd628c0bf7d1.png)
![Copper textures without this resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/488ac5a1dc26b0f3c3688e443673016594332874.png)
